description_long: This house features a minimalist, modern design with clean, rectangular lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure is single-story with a flat green roof, possibly intended as a rooftop garden or terrace. Large, unadorned wall surfaces dominate the facade, with a few small, square windows and a simple, recessed entryway. The property is bordered by paved walkways and a few strategically placed trees, enhancing its urban appeal. The house is surrounded by black privacy walls on three sides, providing seclusion from neighboring properties. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing simplicity and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat green roof, white walls, minimal windows, and black privacy walls, set in an urban environment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two small windows, and a paved walkway with trees and black privacy walls in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat green roof, a recessed entry, and a single tree along the paved side path.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a large, plain white wall and the flat green roof, with minimal visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a blank white wall, a single tree, and the paved walkway, with the entryway partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry with no steps or porch, minimalistic door, and no decorative elements.
